reason: VISION.md directory tree (lines 34-57) lists files that do not exist in the codebase and omits modules that do exist. Specifically: (1) detector/optimizer.js does not exist — hardware optimization is handled by engine/ layer + config.js; (2) runtime/llm.js does not exist — LLM inference is in server/brain.js + engine/; (3) runtime/memory.js does not exist — memory uses store/index.js + runtime/embed.js; (4) install/ directory is listed as a top-level module but actual install files are at project root (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml) and install/ subdirectory; (5) Missing modules: engine/ (6 files — registry, init, ollama, cloud, tts, whisper), cli/ (3 files — setup, browser, download-state), store/ (KV persistence), config.js (unified config center), tunnel.js (LAN tunnel), and all runtime adapters (7 voice adapters + sense adapter + embed stub).
proposedChange:
Update the directory tree in VISION.md to reflect the actual codebase structure. Replace the current tree with:

agentic-service
├── detector/          # 硬件检测 + 配置生成
│   ├── hardware.js    # GPU/CPU/OS/内存检测
│   ├── profiles.js    # 远程配置拉取 + 本地缓存
│   ├── matcher.js     # 硬件-配置匹配评分
│   ├── ollama.js      # Ollama 自动安装 + 模型拉取
│   └── sox.js         # SoX 音频工具检测
├── engine/            # 引擎注册 + 模型发现
│   ├── registry.js    # 引擎注册中心
│   ├── init.js        # 引擎启动
│   ├── ollama.js      # Ollama 引擎
│   ├── cloud.js       # 云端引擎工厂
│   ├── tts.js         # TTS 引擎
│   └── whisper.js     # Whisper STT 引擎
├── runtime/           # 服务运行时
│   ├── stt.js         # 语音识别（多提供商自适应）
│   ├── tts.js         # 语音合成（多提供商自适应）
│   ├── sense.js       # 感知（agentic-sense 封装）
│   ├── embed.js       # 向量嵌入（agentic-embed）
│   ├── profiler.js    # CPU 性能分析
│   ├── vad.js         # 语音活动检测
│   └── adapters/      # 运行时适配器（7 个语音 + sense + embed）
├── server/            # HTTP/WebSocket 服务
│   ├── api.js         # REST API + OpenAI 兼容
│   ├── brain.js       # LLM 推理 + 工具调用（含云端 fallback）
│   ├── hub.js         # 设备管理 + 会话共享
│   ├── middleware.js  # 错误处理中间件
│   ├── cert.js        # 自签名证书
│   └── httpsServer.js # HTTPS 服务器
├── store/             # 数据持久化
│   └── index.js       # KV 存储（agentic-store）
├── cli/               # 命令行工具
│   ├── setup.js       # 首次安装向导
│   ├── browser.js     # 自动打开浏览器
│   └── download-state.js
├── config.js          # 统一配置中心
├── tunnel.js          # LAN 隧道（ngrok/cloudflared）
├── index.js           # 包入口
└── ui/                # Web 前端
    ├── client/        # 聊天界面（Vue 3）
    └── admin/         # 管理面板（Vue 3）
resolution: Merged into existing task-1775847821786 (Update VISION.md directory tree). Task upgraded to P0 with full proposed tree from this CR.
